version.author: ajsfx
version.changelog: Moved settings to a separate script

reapack.name: ajsfx_SetAllSelectedItemsLengthToFirstSelectedItem.lua
reapack.desc: Set All Selected Items Length To First Selected Item

reapack.name: ajsfx_Track_CollapseVisibleChildrenAtHighestSelectedLevel.lua
reapack.desc: Collapse Visible Children At Highest Selected Level

reapack.name: ajsfx_Track_CollapseVisibleChildrenAtLowestSelectedLevel.lua
reapack.desc: Collapse Visible Children At Lowest Selected Level

reapack.name: ajsfx_Track_UnCollapseVisibleChildrenAtHighestSelectedLevel.lua
reapack.desc: Uncollapse Visible Children At Highest Selected Level

reapack.name: ajsfx_Track_UnCollapseVisibleChildrenAtLowestSelectedLevel.lua
reapack.desc: Uncollapse Visible Children At Lowest Selected Level

reapack.name: ajsfx_TrackVersioning.lua
reapack.desc: Track Versioning: Duplicate, Increment Version, and Archive Old
